## Constitution Alignment *(replace samples with feature-specific items)*

### HIG & Native Feel

- [ ] CHK001 iPhone interaction path is idiomatic (navigation, sheets, touch)
- [ ] CHK002 Mac interaction path is idiomatic (window/sidebar, keyboard/pointer)
- [ ] CHK003 Dynamic Type and VoiceOver labels cover critical controls
- [ ] CHK004 Reduce-motion safe for non-essential animation

### Theme

- [ ] CHK005 Only semantic `Color.Theme` / shared modifiers for chrome
- [ ] CHK006 Light, dark, and system appearance verified

### Performance

- [ ] CHK007 Large collections use lazy containers / stable identities
- [ ] CHK008 No heavy decode/sync work in `body` or gesture path

### Multiplatform & Architecture

- [ ] CHK009 Shared domain/UI; platform forks only via guards/adapters
- [ ] CHK010 Durable writes go through services + drafts
- [ ] CHK011 Platform-limited APIs have fallback UX (no crash)

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
